name: 7 Grain Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole kernel corn and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large kettle.
2. Add tomatoes and juice, green beans and juice, celery stalks, corn, mushrooms, squash, onion powder, garlic powder, celery seed, and sea salt. Stir well.
3. Simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
4. Before serving, add 1 tablespoon of Am Canola Oil and a handful of chopped parsley. Additional vegetables can be added or substituted as desired.
